results.title: Dell Technologies Delivers Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Fiscal 2025 Financial Results
results.snippet: Dell Technologies reported fourth-quarter revenue of $23.9 billion, up 7% year over year, with operating income of $2.2 billion up 40% and record diluted EPS of $2.15.

results.title: Dell Technologies Delivers Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Fiscal 2025 Financial Results
results.snippet: Dell Technologies delivered Q4 fiscal 2025 revenue of $23.9 billion and full-year revenue of $95.6 billion, with strong growth in operating income and EPS.

results.title: Dell (NYSE:DELL) Delivers Strong Q4 CY2025 Numbers
results.snippet: Dell reported Q4 CY2025 revenue of $33.38 billion, beating estimates with 39.5% year-on-year growth, and adjusted EPS of $3.89.

results.title: Dell Technologies Delivers Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Fiscal 2025 Financial Results
results.snippet: The company posted Q4 revenue of $23.9 billion up 7% and full year revenue growth, along with record non-GAAP diluted EPS of $2.68 for the quarter.

results.title: Dell Technologies Inc Earnings - Q4 2025 Analysis & Results
results.snippet: Dell reported Q4 revenue of $33.4 billion up 39% with diluted EPS of $3.89, driven by AI server demand and strong cash flow.

results.title: Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA Delivers Proven Path to Enterprise AI ROI
results.snippet: Dell announces new PowerEdge servers including the liquid-cooled XE9812 available in 2H 2026 and XE9880L/XE9885L in Q3 2026 as part of its AI Factory with NVIDIA.

results.title: Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA Delivers Proven Path to Enterprise AI ROI
results.snippet: Dell AI Data Platform and end-to-end infrastructure advancements featuring NVIDIA Vera Rubin and other GPUs aim to remove barriers to enterprise AI deployment with 2026 server launches.

results.title: DELL's AI Server Momentum Surges: Can It Drive Long-Term Growth?
results.snippet: Dell Technologies reported AI-optimized server revenues growing more than fourfold year-over-year in fiscal 2026, projecting nearly $50 billion in fiscal 2027 with a strong backlog.

results.title: Modernize the Grid, Accelerate AI: Dell at DTECH 2026
results.snippet: Dell showcases its AI Factory solutions at DTECH 2026 to help utilities modernize grids with AI-driven predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and real-time data processing.

results.title: Data Center Infrastructure in 2026
results.snippet: AI infrastructure supply chains face growing constraints heading into 2026, with memory vendors prioritizing higher-capacity production to meet surging demand.

results.title: Goldman Sachs Raises Dell Price Target to $215: Is This AI Server Powerhouse Still the Best Value in Tech?
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs raised its price target on Dell (DELL) to $215 from $195 while maintaining a Buy rating, citing AI server dominance and DRAM supply advantages.

results.title: Dell Technologies (DELL) hits all-time high as Goldman hikes PT by $10
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs raised its price target for Dell Technologies to $195 from $180 while reaffirming its Buy rating, helping the stock reach an all-time high.

results.title: Dell Technologies Climbs 16% YTD: Should You Buy the Stock?
results.snippet: DELL stock is up 16% YTD outpacing its industry as AI server demand, a $43B backlog and strong cash flow position it for continued growth.

results.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Dell Technologies Price Target to ...
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs adjusted its price target for Dell Technologies amid ongoing analyst coverage of the stock's performance.

results.title: Dell Stock Is Gaining In After Hours – Here's Why
results.snippet: Goldman Sachs raised its price target on Dell Technologies to $195 from $180 and maintained a Buy rating, causing the stock to gain in after-hours trading.
